prompt: FIXED SUBJECT. The attached image is a locked foreground layer. Mask and lock every pixel of the woman and her entire dress: her face, expression, skin, hair, arms; the cream ditsy-floral cotton dress with white lace-trimmed flutter sleeves and neckline, shirred waist and full midi skirt; her shoes, bracelet and jewelry. Reproduce all of that EXACTLY and identically — do not redraw, recolor, restyle, re-pattern, resize or move it, and do not 'clean up' the floral print. Inpaint ONLY the background outside the locked subject. Preserve the original framing; do not crop. Match the new background's light direction and warmth to the light already on her so it composites naturally. Scene: seen from behind on a Provencal cafe terrace in golden afternoon light — ochre-washed wall with open cafe doorway, vintage cane bistro chairs, terracotta pots of pink geraniums and bougainvillea, dappled plane-tree light over a cobbled square. Warm low sun from the left and behind.
